eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 11:54 AM on MAY 1, 2019 Effective until 12:54 PM. Message from MN HSEM.
extra_text: This is a coordinated test of the broadcast stations in your area. If this had been an actual emergency, official messages would have followed the alert tone. This concludes a test of the Emergency Alert System. This is only a test.
